## Agent name

<!-- Which domain does this agent belong to? e.g. backend, frontend, devops, security, data, sdlc, qa. -->

## Use case

<!-- Describe the problem this agent solves. What does Richardson get done with this agent that he can't easily do today? -->

## Trigger phrases

<!-- List 3-5 natural-language phrases that should route to this agent. -->

- "..."
- "..."
- "..."

## Tools needed

- [ ] Read
- [ ] Edit
- [ ] Write
- [ ] WebFetch / WebSearch
- [ ] Other (specify):

## Inputs / outputs

<!-- What does the agent take as input, and what does it produce? Reference any state file contracts (outputs/team_state/*.json) it should write or read. -->

<!-- How will we know this agent is done and working? Concrete checks please. -->

- [ ] ...
